title: Failed to initialize timezone storage: not found in timezone database

messages.content: # Here is how to fix “ Failed to initialize timezone storage: not found in timezone database “

## Method 1
> This issue is caused by CSP versions `3.0-preview210` and `3.0-preview211`
> Update to CSP Version [`3.0-preview212`](https://www.patreon.com/posts/merry-christmas-146659505) and the issue will be fixed
